tasks.title: Birinchi Dockerfile
tasks.why: Har image Dockerfile'dan boshlanadi. Eng kichik: FROM + CMD.
steps: Ishchi papkangga o't:  cd ~/devops/days/day-16/work && mkdir -p basic && cd basic

tasks.title: RUN direktivasi
tasks.why: RUN — qurish vaqtida buyruq (masalan fayl yaratish).
steps: snippets/run.Dockerfile yarat:  FROM alpine  (yangi qator)  RUN echo qurildi > /built.txt

tasks.title: COPY direktivasi
tasks.why: COPY — host faylini image ичiga ko'chiradi.
steps: snippets/copy.Dockerfile yarat:  FROM alpine  (yangi qator)  COPY x.txt /x.txt

tasks.title: WORKDIR direktivasi
tasks.why: WORKDIR — image ичidagi ishchi papkani belgilaydi.
steps: snippets/wd.Dockerfile yarat:  FROM alpine  (yangi qator)  WORKDIR /app

tasks.title: Qur va ishga tushir
tasks.why: O'z image'ingni qurib, ishga tushirish — to'liq sikl.
steps: docker build -t d16hi . && docker run --rm d16hi > ../out.txt

tasks.title: COPY bilan ilova
tasks.why: Ilova faylini image'ga COPY qilib, CMD bilan ishlatish.
steps: Dockerfile:  FROM alpine  /  COPY app.sh /app.sh  /  CMD ["sh", "/app.sh"]
docker build -t d16app . && docker run --rm d16app > ../app-out.txt

tasks.title: ENV va EXPOSE
tasks.why: ENV — muhit o'zgaruvchisi; EXPOSE — port hujjati.
steps: snippets/web.Dockerfile yarat: FROM alpine / ENV NAME=devops / EXPOSE 8080

tasks.title: Versiya (tag)
tasks.why: Image'ни versiya bilan teglash — relizlarni boshqarish.

tasks.title: Day-8 skript: build avtomatika
tasks.why: Day-8 bash: image'ни quradigan skript (deploy avtomatikasi).
steps: cb/build.sh yoz (#!/bin/bash, set -e):  cd hi && docker build -t d16cb . && echo BUILT

tasks.title: Day-1 tuzilma + Dockerfile
tasks.why: Day-1 tartibli loyiha: src/ + Dockerfile bilan.
steps: svc/Dockerfile: FROM alpine / COPY src/run.sh /run.sh / CMD ["sh","/run.sh"]

tasks.title: To'liq Dockerfile
tasks.why: FROM + WORKDIR + COPY + CMD — to'liq image retsepti.
steps: myimg/Dockerfile: FROM alpine / WORKDIR /app / COPY greet.sh . / CMD ["sh","greet.sh"]

tasks.title: Qur va ishlat
tasks.why: Loyiha yakuni: image'ни qurib, ishga tushirib, natijani saqlash.
steps: cd myimg && docker build -t d16proj . && docker run --rm d16proj > ../proj-out.txt

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
steps: RUN va CMD farqini + docker build nima qilishini ustozга ayt
